category_sources: source_facts.description says ImageWorsener is a utility and library for image scaling and processing; official homepage describes a cross-platform image scaling and processing utility/library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and official GitHub repository use the display name ImageWorsener.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to documentation and technical notes; official GitHub README documents command-line usage and features.
repo_sources: Official ImageWorsener homepage states the source is available on GitHub and links to github.com/jsummers/imageworsener.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe image scaling, image processing, and utility/library roles.
